w. II. Upper has replaced Ludlow
Daniels on the arbitration committee
of the typographical union. Mr.. Dan
iels left for Manila last week to ac-
cept a position with the government.
He was a linotype operator and one
of the most popular printers In the
city.


Leather workers and horse goods
union. structural iron and bridge
mems union and Transfers and team
owners union will meet at Central
Labor hall tonight.


AS there Is hitch in the new scale
Of wages recently presented to the
trades council by the cooks and wait
ers for endorsement, the council upon
motion last Tuesday night decided to
reconsider the matter and to with
draw the endorsement for the pres
emit.


The new stablemen's union will not
close its charter for another week
